title: Super Glue Twin Pack – 2x5g Bottles with Tube & Brush Applicators Extra Strong Quick Drying Adhesive for Jewellery, China, Plastics, Pottery, Wood, Glass & Household DIY Repairs
features: DUAL APPLICATORS: Features both a tube applicator for general use and a precision brush applicator for detailed work, offering versatile application options
VERSATILE BONDING: Effectively bonds jewellery, china, most plastics, pottery, aluminium, rubber and various household items for reliable repairs
QUICK-SETTING: Provides rapid bonding capability, creating strong adhesion between surfaces within seconds of application
PACKAGE CONTENTS: Twin pack containing two 5g bottles of super glue with different applicator types for various usage scenarios
SAFETY FEATURES: Includes clear usage instructions and safety warnings, with secure screw-down caps to prevent accidental spillage
description: Please note: All makes of Super Glue come seemingly half full, this is deliberately done in order for the product to remain usable over time and also to allow for controlled dispensing of the product, there is 5 grams of glue in each bottle. Introducing the 151 Super Glue Twin Pack, your ultimate solution for all bonding needs. This versatile set includes two 5g bottles with different applicators - a precision tube applicator for general use and a brush applicator for fine detail work. Perfect for fixing jewellery, china, plastics, pottery, aluminium, rubber and various household items. The fast-acting formula creates strong, durable bonds in seconds. The twin pack design offers excellent value and flexibility for different application needs. Each bottle features a secure cap to prevent drying and maintain the glue's effectiveness. For best results, ensure surfaces are clean and dry before application. Note: This is a strong adhesive that bonds quickly - please read all safety instructions carefully before use and keep away from children. The package includes detailed application instructions for optimal results. Handle with appropriate care as the product contains cyanoacrylate.
